# About Jerusalem College of Engineering

Shaping future engineers with excellence in technical education since 1998. NAAC A+ Accredited (3.26 CGPA) | Anna University Affiliated | Autonomous Institution

## Our Vision

To be a premier institution of technical education recognized globally for producing industry-ready engineers who are innovative, ethical, and committed to societal development.

## Our Mission

* •Provide quality technical education through innovative teaching
* •Foster industry-academia collaboration for practical learning
* •Promote research and entrepreneurship among students
* •Instill ethical values and social responsibility

## Excellence in Technical Education

Jerusalem College of Engineering (JCOE), established in 2007, is one of the leading technical institutions in Tamil Nadu. Located in Chennai, the college is affiliated to Anna University and approved by AICTE, New Delhi.

The institution offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in various engineering disciplines. Our state-of-the-art infrastructure, experienced faculty, and industry-oriented curriculum have made us a preferred choice for aspiring engineers.

We believe in holistic development through academic excellence, practical training, and extracurricular activities. Our alumni are placed in leading companies across the globe.

### 17+

Years of Academic Excellence

## Our Journey

A timeline of milestones that have shaped Jerusalem College of Engineering

1998

### Foundation

Jerusalem College of Engineering established by Hezekiah Educational Trust with vision of excellence

2001

### AICTE Approval

Received AICTE approval and affiliated to Anna University, Chennai

2007

### NBA Accreditation

First NBA accreditation received for engineering programs

2014

### NAAC A Grade

Awarded NAAC A Grade accreditation demonstrating quality standards

2018

### Autonomous Status

Granted Autonomous status by Anna University

2022

### NAAC A+ Grade

Re-accredited with NAAC A+ Grade with 3.26 CGPA

2024

### Expansion

12+ UG & PG programs, 90% placement rate, state-of-the-art facilities
